result:
All 484 assertions pass.

**Summary**: Fixed all bugs in the 13-module Beagle inventory system:
- 6 mechanical accessor swaps from `beagle-fix --apply`
- 13 type errors (missing args, wrong accessors, wrong scalar unwraps)
- 11 logic bugs: `product-margin` operands swapped, `tier-discount-pct` gold/bronze swapped, `calculate-tax` had `*2`, `calculate-total` used `+` instead of `-` for discount, `zone-surcharge`/`poline-total`/`line-commission` used `+` instead of `*`, `reorder-needed` used `>` instead of `<`, coupon discount divisor was 10 instead of 100, `total-commission` called param as function, `entries-in-period` had `>=` twice instead of `>=`/`<=`, `products-by-category` had wrong accessor (over-applied auto-fix corrected back)
